item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response wakes up immediately with a brake, refuses making the refrigerator-side confirmer the default workflow, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior manual guard/recheck fixes, and shifts toward upstream causes such as permissions, scanning, capacity, handoff, and responsibility boundaries. It allows only a time-boxed emergency confirmer for the day and explicitly says to remove it from the baseline, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of simply adding another manual gate."}
